name: Pavlova Cg's Way
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites with the cream of tarter until foamy.
2. Add vanilla extract and sugar, then beat until very stiff peaks form.
3. Line a baking sheet with greased parchment paper.
4. Draw a circle (12-14 inches in diameter) on the paper before greasing it.
5. Spread the egg whites to about 1/4-1/2 inch thick.
6. Using a spoon, pipe or create a well in the center of the meringue about 1 inch high.
7. Place the baking sheet in a low oven (150-200°C) and bake until the meringue is dry and solid but not browned. If it starts to brown, lower the temperature slightly.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
9. Carefully peel off the parchment paper.
10. Whip the heavy cream with vanilla extract.
11. Assemble the "tart" by spreading the whipped cream on top of the cooled meringue.
12. Arrange the fruit (cut into wedges or slices) over the cream, ensuring all areas are covered.
13. Lightly wet the fruit with a little water to help it adhere.
14. Sprinkle sugar over the fruit for added texture and shine.
15. Assemble just before serving. Enjoy!
